# ChatIslam

AI-powered Islamic knowledge chat and dawah platform. Authentic answers sourced from Quran, Hadith, and classical scholarship.

**Live:** [chatislam.org](https://chatislam.org)

[![Live](https://img.shields.io/badge/web-chatislam.org-brightgreen)](https://chatislam.org)

## About

ChatIslam gives accessible Islamic knowledge through AI conversations. It serves three audiences with adapted communication styles:

- **Muslim mode** -- scholarly depth with Hadith citations, madhab positions, and classical references
- **New Muslim mode** -- gentle step-by-step guidance, encouraging tone, practical focus
- **Dawah mode** -- bridge-building language for non-Muslim audiences, universal concepts first

All responses follow Ahl us-Sunnah wal-Jamaah methodology, sourced from the Islam.wiki knowledge base. Complex fiqh questions escalate to vetted scholars.

ChatIslam also incorporates all Q&A functionality previously available at IslamQA (islamqa.us), which redirects here.

## Key design principles

1. **Source-grounded** -- every answer cites Quran, Hadith, or classical scholarship
2. **Audience-adaptive** -- tone and depth match who is asking
3. **Honest about limits** -- the AI does not issue fatwas; scholars do
4. **Embeddable** -- other Islamic sites can embed ChatIslam as a widget
